title: Mo’ Creatures: Nostalgia Edition
description: Mo’ Creatures: Nostalgia Edition is a faithful revival of Dr. Zhark’s original vision
body:
![Main Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wygtYIh7/images/623b621f9b20ddd998e054fe9f629be27ed0be32.jpeg)
# 📦 What is *Mo’ Creatures: Nostalgia Edition*?

Mo’ Creatures: Nostalgia Edition is a faithful revival of [Dr. Zhark’s original vision](https://github.com/DrZhark/mocreaturesdev) — meticulously rebuilt to match the beloved classic experience. Originating from the [Mo’ Creatures Extended](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mo-creatures-extended) project for Minecraft 1.12.2, this edition now supports both **Minecraft 1.16.5** and upcoming support for **1.20.1**.

### 🐉 The Wyvern Dimension

Reimagined due to extensive changes in Minecraft’s engine since 1.12.2, the **Wyvern Dimension** has been carefully reconstructed, featuring new nests, updated portal logic, and refined biome generation.

### 🌟 True to the Original

With meticulous attention to detail, Mo’ Creatures: Nostalgia Edition remains exceptionally faithful, with:

* Original mob behaviors and interactions preserved.
* Accurate taming and breeding mechanics.
* Precise dimension teleportation mechanics.
* Optimized performance and multiplayer synchronization.

## 🔍 How is this different from Awakened & Reforged?

Unlike other revivals that utilize tools like MCreator, Nostalgia Edition is built directly from the **original Mo’ Creatures source code**, preserving:

* Authentic taming and AI mechanics.
* Original gameplay and dimension experiences.
* Enhanced stability and compatibility.

This isn't merely a reimagining — it's a precise and loving restoration.

## ✅ Supported Versions

Current development priorities:

* **1.16.5 Forge** (stable release completed)
* **1.20.1 Forge** (stable release completed)

Following stable Forge releases, **Fabric** support is planned.
